zh.lifeSummary: 當John Scarlett於大約1529年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可納易藍德時，他的父親John Harvey Scarlett21歲，母親Rebecca Pitchels30歲。他於1554年1月26日與Margaret Marten在英國英格蘭素福爾可萊哈姆聖 安德也斯 邱奇結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1571年11月11日之前在他的家鄉，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可納易藍德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Scarlett于大约1529年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可納易藍德时，他的父亲John Harvey Scarlett21岁，母亲Rebecca Pitchels30岁。他于1554年1月26日与Margaret Marten在英国英格兰素福爾可萊哈姆聖 安德也斯 邱奇结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1571年11月11日之前在他的家乡，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可納易藍德。

nameMeanings.name: Scarlett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: perhaps a nickname for someone who made or sold bright, rich fabrics, from Middle English scarlet ‘scarlet (cloth)’ (Old French escarlate, Late Latin scarlata).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When John Scarlett was born about 1529, in Nayland, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Harvey Scarlett, was 21 and his mother, Rebecca Pitchels, was 30. He married Margaret Marten on 26 January 1554, in St Andrew's Church, Layham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. He died before 11 November 1571, in his hometown, and was buried in Nayland, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Scarlett est né environ 1529, à Nayland, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Harvey Scarlett, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Rebecca Pitchels, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Marten le 26 janvier 1554, à St Andrew's Church, Layham, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé avant 11 novembre 1571, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à Nayland, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Scarlett um 1529 in Nayland, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Harvey Scarlett 21 und seine Mutter Rebecca Pitchels 30. Er hat am 26. Januar 1554 in St Andrew's Church, Layham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Margaret Marten geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb vor 11. November 1571 in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Nayland, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Scarlett è nato il circa 1529 nel Nayland, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Harvey Scarlett, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Rebecca Pitchels, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Marten il 26 gennaio 1554, nel St Andrew's Church, Layham, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. Morì prima del 11 novembre 1571, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolto a Nayland, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Scarlettが約1529年にイギリスイギリススフォルクナイランドで生まれた時，父John Harvey Scarlettは21歳，母Rebecca Pitchelsは30歳であった。1554年1月26日にイギリスイギリススフォルクレイハムスト アンドリュー'ス チャーチでMargaret Martenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1571年11月11日以前に故郷で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクナイランドにて埋葬された。

ko.Saint Andrew's Church, Layham, Babergh d: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 레이함 스트 앤드루'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: John Scarlett(이)가 대략 1529년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 나이랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Harvey Scarlett(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Rebecca Pitchels(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1554년 1월 26일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 레이함 스트 앤드루'스 c후르치에서 Margaret Marten(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1571년 11월 11일 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 나이랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Scarlett nasceu aproximadamente 1529, em Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Harvey Scarlett, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Rebecca Pitchels, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Marten em 26 de janeiro de 1554, em St Andrew's Church, Layham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 11 de novembro de 1571, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultado em Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Saint Andrew's Church, Layham, Babergh d: ст андрю'с чурч, леихам, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Scarlett родился около 1529 г. в местности неиланд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Harvey Scarlett было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Rebecca Pitchels, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Marten 26 января 1554 г. в местности ст андрю'с чурч, леихам, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер перед 11 ноябрь 1571 г. в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности неиланд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.
